pattern: BFS on a small mutation graph where each node is a valid bank gene reachable by a single character change finds the shortest mutation path in linear time.
hints: Model the gene strings as nodes in an unweighted graph and edges as single-character mutations; shortest path is the BFS level count.
At each BFS step, try all 8 positions and all 3 alternate characters (A/C/G/T) to generate neighbors; only enqueue strings that are in the bank and not yet visited.
Use a set for O(1) bank lookup and visited tracking; if the endGene is never dequeued, return -1.

edge_inputs.description: one mutation, bank contains only the target
end gene not in bank, must return -1
end gene in bank but no path exists
maximum bank size with a longer path
bank has mutations that lead to dead ends, detour needed

stress.description: random bank of 10 genes, random start and end, some reachable some not
stress.note: random genes with end always in bank to ensure valid test
